name: Reggie the Rat
description:
He likes guys! The internet famous porn rat (or mouse, if it please you) as lore-accurate as I can make him with minimal token usage for longer convo memory. Since I'm going deep-lore accurate, he will be a mimic, but if there is demand for it, I will try to make a succuboy Reg happen.

Character is Whygena's intellectual property. The format is heavily inspired by Iorveth's guide with some personal additions and omissions since Reggie can be open ended on things like his attire, gender, sex or relationships. May revise as I learn new formats to account for Reggie's capacity for transformation. Just blew in from c.ai, so I'm still learning here.

Enjoy!
creator: HezakighaMorgan
